summary: Tested full CRE-reject -> Planning-resubmit loop in ProjectDetail Payment Schedule. Backend pytest (8/8 PASS) confirms cre-reject sets workflow_status='cre_rejected' and populates cre_rejection_reason/by_name/at; planning-resubmit flips to 'requested', clears all cre_rejection_* keys, persists new amount + remarks, stamps resubmitted_by_name/at. Frontend Playwright as Planning user confirms: red CRE Rejected badge in Status column, red detail row with reason + rejector + timestamp, Edit & Resubmit button opens Shadcn Dialog (ps-resubmit-dialog) with amount + remarks fields, submit calls /payment-stages/{id}/planning-resubmit and shows success toast. Backend re-fetched after UI submit confirmed amount=90000, remarks set, cre_rejection_reason=null, workflow_status='requested'. No window.prompt() used.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking Resubmit, success toast shows but the row in the payment schedule still shows the red CRE Rejected badge + red detail row until the page is hard-refreshed. Backend state is correct (workflow_status='requested', cre_rejection_reason cleared). Stale frontend state only.

action_items: Investigate fetchData(false) in ProjectDetail.jsx PS Resubmit submit handler (line 8474). After successful POST /payment-stages/{id}/planning-resubmit, row still shows CRE Rejected badge until full reload. Suggested fix: optimistically update the stage in local state, or ensure fetchData re-reads /api/projects/{project_id}/payment-stages.
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetail.jsx is 8652 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. New PS Resubmit Dialog (8388-8486) and rejection detail tr (5540-5575) are clean and use proper data-testids, but file urgently needs splitting per-tab.

Backend cre-reject correctly validates state transitions (only from 'requested') and rejects empty/whitespace reasons with 400. planning-resubmit correctly $unsets cre_rejection_* fields. Both endpoints write workflow_history audit entries and notify the other side.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up project SEEDproj_bf85a0bb + stage ps_fd2eee32781b.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend flow fully verified by pytest test_payment_stage_cre_reject_resubmit.py (8/8). Only outstanding item: stale UI after successful resubmit. To reproduce: seed cre_rejected stage, login as planning, click Edit & Resubmit, submit dialog. Toast appears but row keeps showing CRE Rejected badge. Check ProjectDetail.jsx fetchData(false) at line 8474.
rca of the issue: Badge logic: stage.workflow_status === 'cre_rejected' OR (!!stage.cre_rejection_reason && workflow_status !== 'requested' && workflow_status !== 'collected'). Backend correctly $unsets cre_rejection_reason and flips workflow_status to 'requested'. If fetchData(false) does not refetch /api/projects/{project_id}/payment-stages (or returns cached data), local paymentStages state retains the old document. Fix: optimistic local update, or guarantee /payment-stages refetch.
